([Ukrainian](/wiki/Ukrainian_language "Ukrainian language"): Будьоннівський район; [Russian](/wiki/Russian_language "Russian language"): Будённовский район) is an urban district of the city of [Donetsk](/wiki/Donetsk "Donetsk"), Ukraine, named after [Marshal of the Soviet Union](/wiki/Marshal_of_the_Soviet_Union "Marshal of the Soviet Union") [Semyon Mikhailovich Budyonny](/wiki/Semyon_Budyonny "Semyon Budyonny").

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

This article is about a district in city of [Donetsk](/wiki/Donetsk "Donetsk"). For an administrative division under similar name in [Stavropol Krai](/wiki/Stavropol_Krai "Stavropol Krai"), see [Budyonnovsky District](/wiki/Budyonnovsky_District "Budyonnovsky District").

Urban district in Donetsk City Municipality, Ukraine

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/24/Raions_of_Donetsk_and_Donetsk_City_Municipality.PNG/250px-Raions_of_Donetsk_and_Donetsk_City_Municipality.PNG)](/wiki/File:Raions_of_Donetsk_and_Donetsk_City_Municipality.PNG)

[Raions](/wiki/Raion "Raion") of Donetsk on the territory of the Donetsk City Municipality:

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Budonivskyi District  Voroshylovskyi District  Kalininskyi District  Kyivskyi District  Kirovskyi District | Kuibyshevskyi District  Leninskyi District  Petrovskyi District  Proletarskyi District |

**Budonnivskyi District** ([Ukrainian](/wiki/Ukrainian_language "Ukrainian language"): Будьоннівський район; [Russian](/wiki/Russian_language "Russian language"): Будённовский район) is an urban district of the city of [Donetsk](/wiki/Donetsk "Donetsk"), Ukraine, named after [Marshal of the Soviet Union](/wiki/Marshal_of_the_Soviet_Union "Marshal of the Soviet Union") [Semyon Mikhailovich Budyonny](/wiki/Semyon_Budyonny "Semyon Budyonny").

It was created in 1980 out of the Proletarskyi, Kirovskyi and Leninskyi districts. The district's name was a revival of the original name of Proletarskyi District.

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/af/%D0%91%D1%83%D0%B4%D1%91%D0%BD%D0%BD%D0%BE%D0%B2%D1%81%D0%BA%D0%B8%D0%B9_%D1%80%D0%B0%D0%B9%D0%BE%D0%BD_%D0%94%D0%BE%D0%BD%D0%B5%D1%86%D0%BA%D0%B0_006.jpg/250px-%D0%91%D1%83%D0%B4%D1%91%D0%BD%D0%BD%D0%BE%D0%B2%D1%81%D0%BA%D0%B8%D0%B9_%D1%80%D0%B0%D0%B9%D0%BE%D0%BD_%D0%94%D0%BE%D0%BD%D0%B5%D1%86%D0%BA%D0%B0_006.jpg)](/wiki/File:%D0%91%D1%83%D0%B4%D1%91%D0%BD%D0%BD%D0%BE%D0%B2%D1%81%D0%BA%D0%B8%D0%B9_%D1%80%D0%B0%D0%B9%D0%BE%D0%BD_%D0%94%D0%BE%D0%BD%D0%B5%D1%86%D0%BA%D0%B0_006.jpg)

Slag heaps, locally known as terrikon
